batch_objective: Extend the Patch Editor to edit raw MEMORY values (memory address -> value/bytes), not only A2L parameters. A unified change-set file holds BOTH the A2L parameter change-list (batch-03) and the memory-field changes. Selective export from the unified file: a CDFX for the parameter half (reusing the batch-03 CDFX writer) + a separate JSON file for the memory-field half. SCOPE: memory-change model + unified change-set file read/write + selective export. NOT in scope: applying changes to the firmware image / exporting modified S19 (remains deferred).
branch: dev-flow/batch-02-direction-b-restyle (shared working tree - batches 02/03/04 accumulating uncommitted; owner to split/commit)
batch_layout: Each batch archived under .dev-flow/<YYYY-MM-DD>-batch-NN/. Living docs (REQUIREMENTS.md, tests/, docs/diagrams/) kept current.
autonomous_mode: User instructed 'continue for 5 more hours'. Orchestrator runs batch-04 and follow-on batches autonomously: best-criteria defaults for open questions, auto-approve clean increments, gate/stop only on genuine blockers, NO commit/push/PR. Full report on user return.

decisions_log.notes: batch-04 opened (autonomous run). Memory-value editing + unified change-set + selective export. Builds on batch-03 cdfx/ package + Patch Editor. Engine consumed read-only. Note: a transient Anthropic API incident delayed the start ~12 min.
Phase 1. architect dispatched to derive US/HLR/LLR; open questions resolved by best-criteria defaults (user away).
